case_title: SIMS, FLETCHER R. VS HAMPTON, JOHN H.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY SIMS, FLETCHER R. AS TO DEFENDANT HAMPTON, JOHN H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HAMPTON, JOHN H.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMS, FLETCHER R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMPTON, JOHN H. $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HAMPTON, JOHN H.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-21-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-14-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES SETTLED. DEFT. TO PAY PLFT. $500.00 BY 10/5/01; $500.00 BY 11/5/01; AND $500.00 BY 12/5/1 IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 12/14/01, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
